---
title: &TITLE Tara Broughton
last: Broughton
first: Tara
subtitle: "EPSRC PhD Student"
people_group: "phdstudent"
email: "your@email.com"
education:
  - MMath in Mathematics | University of York 
description: "This is not used in this template"
image: unnamed.jpg
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    # sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
  - id: blogs
    contents: 
      - "../../../posts/**/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    # sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [title, date, description]
about: 
  id: about
  template: solana
  image-shape: rectangle
  image: unnamed.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your@email.com
editor: 'source'
---

<hr>

::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}
:::

<br>

## Research Interests

I am interested in determining the impact of an event and evaluating its significance, as well as investigating how much data is required to draw these conclusions. I have been a football fan since growing up, so I enjoy applying these methods to football data.

## {{< meta first >}}' blogs
::: {#blogs}
:::

<br>

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
